description_long: This is a weathered, cylindrical metal barrel with a faded white exterior and visible rust stains, suggesting prolonged outdoor exposure. The surface is marked by two prominent horizontal metal bands encircling the top and bottom, providing structural reinforcement. The top of the barrel features two circular openings, likely for filling and dispensing contents, and is heavily rusted and pitted. Large, partially legible black stenciled numbers and symbols are visible on the side, indicating it may have once stored industrial or hazardous materials. The lower portion of the barrel is darker, possibly from accumulated grime or corrosion. The overall appearance is utilitarian and robust, typical of barrels found in urban or industrial environments.
description: A weathered, rust-stained metal barrel with faded white paint, black stenciled markings, and reinforced metal bands. The top is pitted and features two circular openings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the most legible portion of the black stenciled numbers and both horizontal metal bands.
description_view_1: Side view with partial stenciled marking visible and more pronounced rust and discoloration.
description_view_2: Rear view with no visible markings, showing mostly plain, weathered metal and both reinforcement bands.
description_view_3: Side view with the beginning of the stenciled numbers visible and a clear view of one of the top openings.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: metal hoops at top and bottom
